title: Sigstore Rekor Log Entry
description: Schema representing an entry in the Sigstore Rekor transparency log.

uuid.description: The UUID of the log entry.

body.description: Base64-encoded entry content containing the signed artifact metadata.

integratedTime.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the entry was integrated into the log.

logID.description: SHA256 hash of the log's public key, identifying which log holds this entry.

logIndex.description: The index of this entry in the transparency log.

verification.description: Proof of inclusion data for this log entry.

inclusionProof.description: Merkle tree inclusion proof for verifying this entry is in the log.

checkpoint.description: Signed tree head (checkpoint) at the time of inclusion.

hashes.description: List of SHA256 hashes forming the inclusion proof path.

logIndex.description: The log index of this entry.

rootHash.description: The Merkle tree root hash at time of inclusion.

treeSize.description: The tree size at time of inclusion.

signedEntryTimestamp.description: Signed Entry Timestamp (SET) — the log's signature over the entry and timestamp.
